claim.text: Spearheaded enterprise-wide agentic AI adoption for multiple Fortune 500 clients

findings.rationale: Scope is asserted without a named system, role detail, or artifact; nothing in the package lets a reviewer check it.
No code, design doc, or demo accompanies the claim.

claim.text: Established AI governance and responsible-AI frameworks adopted across client organizations

findings.rationale: Adoption is claimed but no framework, artifact, or outcome is shown.

claim.text: Led evaluation and testing strategy for mission-critical AI deployments

findings.rationale: No eval methodology, metric, or example is provided to assess depth.
Generic; no problem-to-production arc is described for any single initiative.

matcher_notes: Every claim is unverified. This is NOT a judgment that the candidate is weak; it means the materials give a reviewer nothing to check. The interview questions below exist to convert these into probes. A candidate with real depth will answer them easily.
